description: Reconcile an external salary survey against the HR employee database (localhost:1521/XEPDB1, user: hr, pass: hr123) by synchronizing the EMPLOYEES table with the MARKET_SALARY_SURVEY staging table. Create an audit table named SALARY_CHANGE_LOG with columns: CHANGE_ID (PK), EMPLOYEE_ID, OLD_SALARY, NEW_SALARY, MARKET_SALARY, CHANGE_DATE, and CHANGE_TYPE. Use an Oracle MERGE statement to update salaries in EMPLOYEES to MARKET_SALARY only if the current salary is more than 10% below market (current < market * 0.9), logging these actions as 'MARKET_ADJUSTMENT'. For records in MARKET_SALARY_SURVEY not matched in EMPLOYEES, insert new employee records (email as uppercase last name, hire_date as SYSDATE, department_id as 270) and log as 'NEW_POSITION'. Generate a text report summarizing the total records processed, number of updates, and number of new inserts at /home/ga/Desktop/reconciliation_report.txt.
